title: Marketplace Manager - Axe India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Axe India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Axe India in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Axe India:
Axe India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
